content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates specific, timely reads throughout. In Turn 4, they name the permission-seeking stance explicitly ('You're asking me to give you permission'). In Turn 6, they catch the linguistic move in real time — the client offering something real and immediately deflecting back to the verdict — and name it precisely before inquiring. In Turn 8, they isolate 'Four years' as a charged moment worth pausing on. In Turn 12, they read the defensive pivot ('I do want to think about my partner... I love my life') and name it as defending, redirecting attention back to what just emerged. Reads consistently precede questions and operate at the level of stance (permission-seeking, deflection, defending) rather than just content. The childhood-imprinting pattern is met with a hold ('Stay with what just came out') rather than missed. This is reads functioning as the entry point for intervention.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a want-question but no read named yet."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the permission-seeking stance directly — a specific read on how the client is showing up, not just what they're saying."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the deflection in real time: names that the client offered something real and immediately used it to get back to the verdict. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pauses on 'four years' — reads the charge in that specific data point rather than moving past it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Asks about duration but doesn't name a specific somatic/stance read."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the defensive pivot ('I do want to think about my partner') and names it as defending, holding the client at the imprinting moment."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Somatic reads (breath, voice quieting) are present in the client's text but the coach doesn't name them explicitly — they read stance/linguistic moves instead, which is appropriate and sufficient here."
}
